Mas du Chanoine

Charming guesthouse in Saint-Paul de Vence, French Riviera. A 17th century farmhouse with modern comfort.

Contact

831 chemin de la Bastide Rouge
06570 Saint-Paul de Vence
Côte d'Azur, France

+33 (0)6 27 27 16 49
